entry.title: New: CR 24-64 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 64, CD1 (2023), to amend language in subsections A (Workers’ Compensation Claims) and B (Other Claims or Civil Litigation) of Section 3.16.020, Maui County Code, to increase Corporation Counsel’s authority to settle claims, from $7,500 to $25,000, without Council approval.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
